title: Shipton
bodyText:
Eddy's home: a lakeside town, **destroyed**. The poem "The Priest's Descent" is canon-adjacent lore: **Kol**, priest of Torm, unhinged by loss, became obsessed with sacrifice and burned his own daughter **Trista**; the villagers burned the church; Kol's storm drowned the town. *"Young Edrelon fled the roaring tide... the storm drove him to a hidden cave, its black depths swallowed the boy, unmade. Beneath the lake, beneath the roar, Shipton sleeps forevermore."*

> [!dm] Edrelon ≈ Eddy's soul (see [[pc-eddy]]). Brolin knows a Shipton childhood story about self-sacrifice. The lake, the storm, and the pool are almost certainly the same phenomenon.
